title: Level Preview Thumbnails
summary: Add miniature circuit preview thumbnails to completed levels on the level select screen. After solving a level, capture a simplified snapshot of the solution (gate types + positions + wire endpoints) and store it compactly in localStorage. Render mini-previews as 120x80 canvases on level select cards, show gates as small colored rectangles, wires as thin lines, I/O nodes as dots. Add hover/tap to enlarge, lazy rendering with IntersectionObserver, and LRU eviction to limit storage.

items.description: After solving a level, capture a simplified snapshot of the solution: gate types + positions, wire from/to endpoints (resolved to absolute coordinates), I/O node positions. Store as compact JSON in localStorage under a new PREVIEW_KEY ('signal-circuit-previews').
acceptance_criteria: On level completion, _savePreview(levelId) saves gate positions/types, wire endpoint coords, and I/O node positions to localStorage
Data is compact: only gate type/x/y, wire fromPt/toPt (resolved coords), ioNode type/x/y
Preview updates when player improves a solution (fewer gates replaces old preview)

items.description: Render mini-preview as a 120x80 canvas element on level select cards for completed levels. Gates as small colored rectangles, wires as thin lines, I/O nodes as colored dots.
acceptance_criteria: Completed levels with saved previews show a mini canvas (120x80) on the level card
Gates render as small colored rectangles matching their gate type color
Wires render as thin lines connecting gate pins
I/O nodes render as colored dots (green for inputs, blue for outputs)

items.description: Only show previews for completed levels (locked/uncompleted levels show no preview canvas).
acceptance_criteria: No preview canvas appears on locked or uncompleted level cards
Preview canvas only appears when localStorage has preview data for that level

items.description: Add hover/tap to enlarge preview to a 300x200 overlay positioned near the level card.
acceptance_criteria: Hovering (desktop) or tapping (mobile) on a mini-preview enlarges it to 300x200
Enlarged preview appears as an overlay/popup near the card
Clicking outside or moving mouse away dismisses the enlarged view

items.description: Limit preview storage to last 20 levels using LRU eviction. When saving a 21st preview, evict the oldest (by save timestamp).
acceptance_criteria: Only 20 previews max stored in localStorage
When exceeding 20, the oldest preview by timestamp is evicted
Eviction is automatic and transparent to the user

items.description: Add 'View Solution' button on completed level cards that loads the level with the ghost overlay pre-enabled.
acceptance_criteria: Completed level cards have a 'View Solution' button/icon
Clicking it loads the level and enables the ghost overlay automatically

items.description: Ensure previews update when player improves a solution (fewer gates). The new, better solution replaces the old preview.
acceptance_criteria: Re-completing a level with fewer gates updates the stored preview
Preview timestamp updates on each save

items.description: Render previews lazily using IntersectionObserver — only render canvas when scrolled into view.
acceptance_criteria: Preview canvases are not rendered until they scroll into the viewport
IntersectionObserver triggers rendering when card becomes visible
No performance impact from having many preview canvases off-screen

items.description: Add CSS styling for the preview canvas, enlarged overlay, and View Solution button.
acceptance_criteria: Mini-preview canvas has rounded corners, subtle border, and fits within level card
Enlarged overlay has background blur/dark overlay
View Solution button is styled consistently with existing UI

items.description: Scale preview rendering to fit any circuit into the 120x80 canvas. Compute bounding box of all elements and scale/translate to fit with padding.
acceptance_criteria: Circuits of any size fit within the preview canvas with consistent padding
Small circuits don't appear tiny — they're scaled up to fill available space
Large circuits scale down proportionally

testing_focus: Preview appears on completed levels only
Preview canvas renders correctly with gates, wires, and I/O nodes
Enlarged view works on both hover (desktop) and tap (mobile)
LRU eviction works when > 20 previews stored
View Solution button loads ghost overlay correctly
No regression on existing level select rendering
rollback_criteria: If level select rendering breaks or localStorage corruption occurs, revert
